phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è il binario per il treno verso Milano, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH eel bee-NAH-ryoh per eel TREH-noh VEHR-soh mee-LAH-noh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove posso convalidare il biglietto del treno, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh POS-soh kon-val-ee-DAH-reh eel bee-LYET-toh del TREH-noh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Alle macchinette gialle vicino ai binari.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL-leh mahkch-ee-NEHT-teh jee-AHL-leh vee-CHEE-noh AHEE bee-NAH-ree
likely_response.translation_en: At the yellow machines near platforms.

responses.english: At the yellow machines near platforms.
responses.phonetic: AHL-leh mahkch-ee-NEHT-teh jee-AHL-leh vee-CHEE-noh AHEE bee-NAH-ree
responses.local: Alle macchinette gialle vicino ai binari.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si trova la metropolitana qui, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see TROH-vah lah meh-troh-poh-lee-TAH-nah kwee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Segua le indicazioni per la metro.
likely_response.pronunciation: seh-GOO-ah LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee PEHR LAH MEHT-roh

responses.phonetic: seh-GOO-ah LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee PEHR LAH MEHT-roh
responses.local: Segua le indicazioni per la metro.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, quanto costa un biglietto per Roma, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAN-toh COS-tah oon bee-LYET-toh per ROH-mah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.
